raw_title: Inequalities in Offline and Online News Media Environments Across Six Countries: The Role of Social Class and Interest in News
title_en: Inequalities in Offline and Online News Media Environments Across Six Countries: The Role of Social Class and Interest in News
title_zh: 六个国家线上线下新闻媒体环境中的不平等：社会阶层与新闻兴趣的作用
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究调查了六个国家中，人们在获取线下和线上新闻时存在的不平等现象。研究发现，社会阶层和人们对新闻的兴趣程度会影响他们接触新闻的方式和机会。简单来说，不同社会背景的人可能以不同的方式获取新闻，这可能导致信息获取的不平等。
plain_summary_en: This study examines inequalities in how people access news both offline and online across six countries. It finds that social class and interest in news affect how and whether people engage with news media. In simple terms, people from different social backgrounds may get news in different ways, which can lead to unequal access to information.
research_direction_zh: 该研究属于媒体不平等和数字鸿沟领域，关注社会结构因素如何塑造新闻消费模式，特别是在数字媒体环境下的跨国比较研究。
research_direction_en: This research falls within the field of media inequality and digital divide, focusing on how social structural factors shape news consumption patterns, particularly in cross-national comparisons within digital media environments.
